machinery_genes.quote: By a poorly understood mechanism, proteins are recognized by GspK for secretion through the outer membrane pore GspD.
machinery_genes.note: Named as the outer-membrane pore of the B. cenocepacia AU1054 T2SS; same-species transfer to J2315 (see notes). No J2315 locus tag asserted.

machinery_genes.quote: GspJ interacts with two other pseudopilins, GspI and GspG, all of which are required for T2SS.
machinery_genes.note: Pseudopilin of the AU1054 T2SS; same-species transfer to J2315. GspG is the major pseudopilin per the apparatus brief vocabulary.

machinery_genes.quote: GspJ interacts with two other pseudopilins, GspI and GspG, all of which are required for T2SS.
machinery_genes.note: Minor pseudopilin of the AU1054 T2SS; same-species transfer to J2315.

machinery_genes.quote: BPV2225 was found to have an insertion in Bcen_0015 predicted to encode general secretion protein J (gspJ), a component of the type 2 secretion system (T2SS).
machinery_genes.note: gspJ is the gene mutated and characterized in this paper; locus tag Bcen_0015 is the AU1054 tag (NOT the J2315 tag, given here only for traceability). Same-species transfer to J2315.

machinery_genes.quote: The HimarGm transposon (lollipop) located gspJ is not likely to be polar onto gspKLMN since these genes are also known to be essential for T2SS
machinery_genes.note: Named within the gspKLMN block stated to be essential for the AU1054 T2SS; same-species transfer to J2315.

machinery_genes.quote: The HimarGm transposon (lollipop) located gspJ is not likely to be polar onto gspKLMN since these genes are also known to be essential for T2SS
machinery_genes.note: Named within the gspKLMN block essential for the AU1054 T2SS; GspL is the inner-membrane platform component (binds the secretion ATPase) per the apparatus brief. Same-species transfer to J2315.

machinery_genes.quote: The HimarGm transposon (lollipop) located gspJ is not likely to be polar onto gspKLMN since these genes are also known to be essential for T2SS
machinery_genes.note: Named within the gspKLMN block essential for the AU1054 T2SS; same-species transfer to J2315.

machinery_genes.quote: The HimarGm transposon (lollipop) located gspJ is not likely to be polar onto gspKLMN since these genes are also known to be essential for T2SS
machinery_genes.note: Named within the gspKLMN block of the AU1054 T2SS; accessory GspN family per the apparatus brief. Same-species transfer to J2315. Lower-confidence accessory call.

machinery_genes.quote: The prepilin peptidase gene (gspO) and paralogs gspE2 and gspF2 are located in a second region of chromosome one.
machinery_genes.note: gspO named as the prepilin peptidase, stated essential for the AU1054 T2SS ('GspO is known to be essential for T2SS'); encoded in a second region of chromosome one. Same-species transfer to J2315. The paralogs gspE2/gspF2 are deliberately not listed as separate core machinery (functions stated unknown in the paper).

notes: System: the B. cenocepacia type II secretion system, which secretes the zinc metalloproteases ZmpA and ZmpB and polygalacturonases (the curated effector for this instance is BCAL2284). No dedicated apparatus paper exists for strain J2315 itself. The apparatus quotes are taken from Somvanshi et al 2010 (Infect Immun), a study of the SAME species, B. cenocepacia strain AU1054, which characterized the gspJ pseudopilin and named the surrounding T2SS components (secretin GspD, pseudopilins GspG/GspI/GspJ, the gspKLMN block, prepilin peptidase GspO). These are transferred to J2315 as a conspecific T2SS; all locus tags appearing in quotes (e.g. Bcen_0015 for gspJ) are AU1054 tags and are NOT to be read as J2315 loci. Status is PARTIAL, not COMPLETE: the literature for this organism names GspD, GspG, GspI, GspJ, GspK, GspL, GspM, GspN and GspO with quotes, but I found no published sentence naming the inner-membrane platform gene gspC, the secretion ATPase gspE (the AU1054 paper mentions only the paralog gspE2, whose function it states is unknown), the IM platform gspF (only paralog gspF2, function unknown), or the minor pseudopilin gspH for this organism, so those core components are omitted rather than guessed. Deliberately excluded as non-machinery: the secreted substrates ZmpA (Bcen_1233), ZmpB (Bcen_3302), polygalacturonases (Bcen_4887, Bcen_5664), phospholipase C (Bcen_4021); the upstream Sec/Tat translocon; and transcriptional regulators (ShvR, CepR). The paralogs gspE2 and gspF2 were left off the machinery list because the source paper explicitly states their function is unknown. O'Grady 2010 (ShvR regulator paper) and Rosales-Reyes 2012 (ZmpA/ZmpB T2SS substrate escape) are cited as context establishing that J2315/K56-2 operate a functional T2SS, but they do not name the individual apparatus genes.
